title: More Than Vanilla
description: Keeping the spirit of vanilla Minecraft, while adding some polish and introducing a few mods that augment vanilla gameplay.
body:
# More Than Vanilla
is a modpack designed to improve the gameplay with a few QOL improvements, keeping the original Minecraft spirit, while also adding in a few mods that augment vanilla gameplay. 

Most mods belong to one of three categories: Optimization, Gameplay and Libraries. 

## Gameplay
### Content
- [[Ad Astra]](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra/)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric/)
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith/)
- [Fabric Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons/)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones/)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric/)
- [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village/)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap/) and [Xaero's Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map/)
### Eye&Ear candy
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations/) resource pack
- [Immersive Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings/)
- [Ambient Environment](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambient-environment/)
- [Interactic](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactic/)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations/)
- [Complementary Shaders (Unbound)](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound/)
- [xali's Enhanced Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enhanced-vanilla/)
- [Enhanced Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars/)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves/)
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris/)
- [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds/)
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps/)
- [Immersive Thunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder/)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify/)
- [Lamb Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights/)
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers/)


## Optimization
#### Continuity
For connected textures (really nice)
#### Puzzle
For configuring OptiFine alternative mods
#### ImmediatelyFast
For optimizing rendering in immediate mode
#### BetterF3
Without that the F3 menu is a mess
#### Sodium
You know that one, right? Get much more FPS for free.
#### Entity Culling
For not drawing entities that are not visible on screen
#### Indium
Adds support of the Fabric Rendering API for Sodium
#### Sodium Extra
Adds some extra settings for Sodium
#### Lithium and Modern Fix
Just general performance optimization
#### FerriteCore
RAM usage optimization
#### Iris Flywheel Compat
Without this mod (only available on CurseForge atm) you will have heavy FPS drops when looking at stuff from Create mod when shaders are enabled. This mod fixes that. 

## Libraries
- The rest. Not really interestig, but important for the game to work

And much more!
